Class Entity

java.lang.Object
Entity
Direct Known Subclasses:
Commander, Engineer, MaintenanceBot, PowerCell
public abstract class Entity extends Object

    • walk

      protected final void walk(int direction)

    • run

      protected final void run(int direction)

    • reproduce

      protected static void reproduce(Entity parent, int direction)
      Reproduce takes in a parent entity and creates a baby/offspring entity Divides the energy with the baby and places the baby adjacent to the parent depending on input direction. It has special conditions for MaintenanceBots. It copies their gene distribution and rearranges them.
      Parameters:
      Parent - - Parent entity that creates the offspring
      Direction - - The direciton indicates in which block the child will move to be adjacent

    • doTimeStep

      protected abstract void doTimeStep()
      Entity specfic time step

    • toString

      public abstract String toString()
      Returns display character
      Overrides:
      toString in class Object

    • fight

      protected abstract boolean fight(String Opp)
      return true or false depending on fight behavior
      Parameters:
      Opp - - Opponent entity
      Returns:
      - true or false depending on fight behavior

    • makeEntity

      public static void makeEntity(String className) throws InvalidEntityException
      MakeEntity creates a new entity of the given class name using reflection. It rejects null or invalid names, initializes the energy/poistions, and adds it to the population and world grid
      Parameters:
      Name -
      Throws:
      InvalidEntityException

    • getInstances

      public static List<Entity> getInstances(String className) throws InvalidEntityException
      The getinstances class retrieves all the instances/entites of a give type in the population
      Returns:
      instances - Array holding all entitys of same class
      Throws:
      InvalidEntityException

    • runStats

      public static void runStats(String className) throws InvalidEntityException
      Prints a summary of the given entity type. Subclasses can provide their own runStats method with more detailed information.
      Throws:
      InvalidEntityException

    • clearWorld

      public static void clearWorld()

    • worldTimeStep

      public static void worldTimeStep()
      Advances the simulation by one time step. The order of operations within a single time step is: 1. Each existing entity performs its action for this step 2. Resolve encounters — when multiple entities share a location 3. Deduct rest energy cost and remove dead entities (energy invalid input: '<'= 0) 4. Add any offspring born this step to the world 5. Reset movement tracking for the next step 6. Spawn new PowerCells (Params.refresh_powercell_count per step)

    • displayWorld

      public static void displayWorld()
